briefdescription.para: Used to represent an unsupported format. @SINCE_1_1.17.
color depth 8-bit, alpha @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 8-bit, luminance @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 16-bit, luminance with 8 bit alpha @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 16 bit, 5-6-5 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 16 bit, 5-6-5 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 16 bit with alpha, 4-4-4-4 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 16 bit with alpha, 4-4-4-4 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 16 bit with alpha, 5-5-5-1 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 16 bit with alpha, 5-5-5-1 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 24 bit, 8-8-8 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 32 bit, alpha is reserved but not used, 8-8-8-8# @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 32 bit, alpha is reserved but not used, 8-8-8-8# @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 32 bit with alpha, 8-8-8-8 @SINCE_1_0.0
color depth 32 bit with alpha, 8-8-8-8 @SINCE_1_0.0
ETC2 / EAC single-channel, unsigned @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC single-channel, signed @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC dual-channel, unsigned @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC dual-channel, signed @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC RGB @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC RGB using sRGB colourspace. @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC RGB with single bit per pixel alpha mask. @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC RGB using sRGB colourspace, with single bit per pixel alpha mask. @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC RGB plus separate alpha channel. @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC2 / EAC RGB using sRGB colourspace, plus separate alpha channel. @SINCE_1_0.0.
ETC1 RGB as defined by GLES 2 extension OES_compressed_ETC1_RGB8_texture: http://www.khronos.org/registry/gles/extensions/OES/OES_compressed_ETC1_RGB8_texture.txt @SINCE_1_0.0.
PowerVR 4bpp RGB format (v1) as defined by extension IMG_texture_compression_pvrtc: http://www.khronos.org/registry/gles/extensions/IMG/IMG_texture_compression_pvrtc.txt @SINCE_1_0.0.

Color depth 48-bit, 16-16-16 half floating point. @SINCE_1_2.60.

Unsigned int depth format 32-bit. @SINCE_1_9.9.
Float depth format 32-bit. @SINCE_1_9.9.

Packed 32-bit, 11-11-10 unsigned floating point.
Color depth 8-bit, chrominance U.
! Update LAST_VALID_PIXEL_FORMAT below if you add an enum value here.
Enumeration for Pixel formats.

detaileddescription.para:
Pixel format, default color depth is RGBA 32 bit with alpha. @SINCE_1_0.0
BufferImage::Update might not work with BGR/BGRA formats!

briefdescription.para: For asserting that a variable has a valid pixel format.

detaileddescription.para: Sync it to the first value above.

briefdescription.para: For asserting that a variable has a valid pixel format.

detaileddescription.para: Sync it to the last value above.

briefdescription.para: Whether specified pixel format is compressed or not.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_1.33
pixelFormat
The pixel format
True if pixel format is compressed type. False otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Whether specified pixel format contains an alpha value.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
pixelformat
Pixel format
true if format has alpha, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Returns The number of bytes per pixel for the specified pixel format.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
pixelFormat
The pixel format
The number of bytes per pixel

briefdescription.para: Returns the offset of the byte containing the alpha value from the start of the pixel data and the bitmask of that byte to get the alpha value.

detaileddescription.para: For example, in case of Pixel::RGBA4444, byteOffset value is 1 and bitMask value is 0x0f. It means the second byte contains the alpha value and the last 4 bits of the byte is the alpha value.

Bitmask is zero if the pixelFormat does not support alpha. @SINCE_1_0.0
pixelFormat
The pixel format
byteOffset
The byte offset of the byte containing the alpha value
bitMask
The bitmask of the byte to get the alpha value

briefdescription.para: Pixel format types and their properties. @SINCE_1_0.0.
